---
title: "\'Real Childhood- Young Ladyhood, A\' by C. M. Yonge"
---

## \'Real Childhood- Young Ladyhood, A\' by C. M. Yonge

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1893
**Genre:** Non-fiction
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Mothers in Council</i> 3:12 (October 1893) 218-223

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
